governor.name: Addison Forbes Montgomery, M.D., F.A.C.S, F.A.C.O.G.
governor.title: Governor of the State of Washington
bio: Addison Forbes Montgomery is the 23rd Governor of the State of Washington. A board-certified surgeon and obstetrician-gynecologist by training, Governor Montgomery brought decades of clinical and administrative leadership in academic medicine to public service before being elected to the state's highest office.

Her administration has focused on the health of our communities, the stability of our economy, the advancement of our infrastructure, the integrity of our democracy, the strength of our public institutions, the value we place in a high-trust society, and the promise of a better future for all Washingtonians.
Governor Montgomery resides in Olympia with her family. She remains an attending physician of record at Seattle Grace Hospital on a limited, pro bono basis.

hero.headline: A government that meets the moment for every Washingtonian.
hero.lede: From the San Juans to the Palouse, the work of state government is to keep our communities safe, our economy moving, and our promises to one another.

footer.address: Office of the Governor · PO Box 40002 · Olympia, WA 98504-0002
